children.name: p
children.textContent: Tap left pocket → right → chest → forehead before leaving. Say "locked in."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Trace a slow spiral in the air, then open the fridge. Recall your actual need.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Point a finger at your most-avoided task and exhale slowly while staring at it.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Feel your pulse for 8 full beats before sending any stressful text or email.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Announce tomorrow's top task out loud in a ridiculous accent or character voice.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Photo something messy. Assign a dramatic museum title. Feel the cleaning urge arrive.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Pretend your hand is magnetically drawn to your water bottle every 60 minutes.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Wave at your phone screen each time you close a social media app. Intentional exit.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Become a capable alter-ego for exactly 60 seconds to start the task you're dodging.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Whisper tomorrow's hardest commitment into a sock each morning. It absorbs your intent.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Tell a plant (or object) the one task you've been avoiding. Somehow this helps.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Can't choose what to do? Count ceiling tiles. The last digit is your decision number.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Instant absurd resets for overwhelming moments

children.name: p
children.textContent: An instant bizarre ritual will interrupt the spiral and bring you back to earth.
